faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Carteret?
faqs.answer: Carteret residents commonly encounter pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Our technicians are trained to identify the specific species in your property and apply the most effective treatment method for complete elimination.
